title: 5 Leadership Lessons from Tesla’s Turbulent Growth Strategy
summary: Tesla's turbulent growth strategy, characterized by aggressive price cuts, layoffs, and shifting priorities, offers five key leadership lessons. The article highlights that while vision is crucial, execution eventually becomes paramount, and price cuts signal more than just sales tactics. The unpredictable nature of Tesla's operations, heavily tied to Elon Musk's public persona, presents both a growth story and a cautionary tale.

title: Stock market correction close to its ending stages, Morgan Stanley’s Wilson says
summary: Morgan Stanley strategist Michael Wilson believes the current equity market pullback is nearing its end, despite potential near-term volatility. He noted that 50% of Russell 3000 stocks are already down at least 20% from 52-week highs, indicating a mature correction. The bank maintains a constructive 6- to 12-month outlook, projecting accelerating S&P 500 earnings growth of 13%.

title: UK consumers hit by worries over war in Iran, S&P Global says By Reuters
summary: British consumer confidence has dropped to its lowest point since January last year, according to S&P Global, driven by concerns over the Middle East conflict. The S&P Global’s Consumer Sentiment Index fell to 44.1 in March, and households are particularly pessimistic about their financial prospects and big purchases. This decline increases pressure on the Bank of England, which may delay an anticipated interest rate cut due to potential inflation hikes from rising global energy prices.

title: Hyperion Asset Management Ltd Has $515.55 Million Stock Holdings in Tesla, Inc. $TSLA
summary: Hyperion Asset Management Ltd reduced its stake in Tesla, Inc. by 17.2% in the third quarter, bringing its total holdings to 1,159,270 shares valued at $515.55 million, making it their largest position. Other institutional investors have also adjusted their positions in Tesla, while company insiders have recently sold significant amounts of stock. Analysts hold a mixed view on TSLA, with a consensus "Hold" rating and an average price target of $406.84, reflecting both positive news like China sales growth and UK energy business expansion, and negative factors such as competitive pressures and FSD safety concerns.

title: Flow Traders U.S. LLC Takes Position in Direxion Daily TSLA Bull 2X Shares $TSLL
summary: Flow Traders U.S. LLC has acquired a new position in Direxion Daily TSLA Bull 2X Shares (TSLL) during the third quarter, purchasing 627,938 shares valued at approximately $13.26 million. This investment represents 0.5% of Flow Traders U.S. LLC's holdings, making TSLL its 26th largest position and giving them about 0.17% ownership of the fund. Other institutions like UBS Group AG and Jump Financial LLC also increased their stakes in TSLL, a leveraged ETF that aims for 1.5x daily price movement of Tesla stock.

title: Delta Global Management LP Purchases 9,314 Shares of Tesla, Inc. $TSLA
summary: Delta Global Management LP significantly increased its stake in Tesla, Inc. by 211.2%, purchasing an additional 9,314 shares during the third quarter, bringing their total holdings to 13,724 shares valued at $6.103 million. Other institutional investors also adjusted their positions in Tesla, while some insiders, including CFO Vaibhav Taneja and Director James R. Murdoch, sold shares. The article also touches on recent analyst ratings, financial performance, and key news impacting Tesla, including positive developments in China and the UK, and competitive pressures from Rivian.

title: Cinctive Capital Management LP Acquires 4,861 Shares of Tesla, Inc. $TSLA
summary: Cinctive Capital Management LP significantly increased its stake in Tesla, Inc. (NASDAQ:TSLA) by 221.8% in the third quarter, purchasing 4,861 additional shares. Their total holdings now amount to 7,053 shares valued at $3.137 million. This move is part of a broader trend of institutional investment in Tesla, which currently faces mixed sentiment from analysts regarding its China sales, energy business expansion, AI initiatives, competitive pressures, and FSD safety metrics.

title: Invesco Dorsey Wright Consumer Cyclicals Momentum ETF Review and Aggregate Rating (PEZ)
summary: The Invesco Dorsey Wright Consumer Cyclicals Momentum ETF (PEZ) has an aggregate rating of "Moderate Buy" with a consensus price target of $95.28. This rating is based on 515 analyst ratings covering 25 of the ETF's holdings over the past year, representing 77.2% of its portfolio. The individual holdings show a mix of "Moderate Buy" (18), "Hold" (6), and "Reduce" (1) ratings, with several companies like Carvana and Amazon having significant possible upsides.

title: Algert Global LLC Has $13.61 Million Stake in Coursera, Inc. $COUR
summary: Algert Global LLC significantly increased its stake in Coursera, Inc. (NYSE:COUR) by 40.1% in Q3, holding 1,161,981 shares valued at $13.61 million. Other institutional investors also adjusted their positions, and 89.55% of the company's stock is owned by institutional investors and hedge funds. Wall Street analysts have issued various ratings for Coursera, with an average "Hold" rating and a target price of $10.62.

title: GraniteShares 2x Long TSLA Daily ETF (NASDAQ:TSLR) Short Interest Update
summary: Short interest in GraniteShares 2x Long TSLA Daily ETF (NASDAQ:TSLR) significantly increased by 50.2% in February, reaching 1,623,060 shares. This indicates that 20.8% of the company's stock is currently short-sold, with a days-to-cover ratio of 1.2 days based on average daily trading volume. Several institutional investors have also recently adjusted their positions in the ETF.

title: Australia's Syrah, Tesla extend deadline to resolve alleged default in graphite supply deal
summary: Australian graphite miner Syrah Resources and Tesla have extended their deadline to June 1 to resolve an alleged default in their graphite supply agreement. The dispute centers on Tesla's claim that Syrah failed to provide conforming natural graphite active anode material samples from its Vidalia facility in Louisiana. Syrah, while not accepting the default, has agreed to the extension to work with Tesla on the issue, pending approval from the U.S. Department of Energy.

title: Freshpet, Inc. (FRPT) Price Target Raised to $98 at DA Davidson on Q4 Review
summary: DA Davidson raised its price target for Freshpet, Inc. (FRPT) to $98 from $80, maintaining a Buy rating after the company's Q4 2025 results. The firm highlighted FRPT's manufacturing capabilities as a strategic advantage for margin improvement. Freshpet reported strong financial results for Q4 and the full year 2025, with increased net sales and adjusted EBITDA, and provided positive guidance for 2026.

title: Weekend Round-Up: Nio's Big Bet, WeRide's Strategic Partnership, Tesla's Legal Woes, Uber's Robotaxis And More
summary: This week featured significant developments in the automotive and technology sectors. Nio Inc. reiterated its commitment to in-house chip development and battery swapping, while WeRide Inc. expanded its partnership with Tencent Cloud. Tesla Inc. faced a $1 million lawsuit in Texas, and Uber Technologies launched an electric robotaxi service in Las Vegas, furthering its autonomous vehicle initiatives.

title: Here’s How Analysts Reacted To SM Energy’s (SM) $1 Billion Senior Notes
summary: SM Energy Company announced a private offering of $1.0 billion senior notes due 2034 with a 6.625% coupon, aiming to refinance higher-interest debt due in 2028. Analysts Gabriele Sorbara (Siebert Williams Shank & Co) and Scott Hanold (RBC Capital) maintained "Hold" ratings on the stock, with price targets of $28 and $29, respectively. The company plans to use the proceeds to fund a cash tender offer for its 8.375% senior notes due 2028, reducing interest costs and extending debt maturity.

title: Capital Impact Advisors LLC Purchases 5,573 Shares of Tesla, Inc. $TSLA
summary: Capital Impact Advisors LLC increased its stake in Tesla by 20.5% in the third quarter, acquiring an additional 5,573 shares to hold a total of 32,768 shares valued at $14.57 million. This makes Tesla their 13th largest position, representing about 3.3% of their portfolio. The article also notes significant insider selling by Tesla's CFO and a director, and reviews Tesla's current valuation, recent earnings, and analyst consensus.

title: RTX Corporation $RTX Shares Sold by Chevy Chase Trust Holdings LLC
summary: Chevy Chase Trust Holdings LLC reduced its stake in RTX Corporation by 3.1%, selling 22,378 shares, though it still holds 694,137 shares valued at $116.15 million. RTX exceeded Q4 expectations with $1.55 EPS and $24.24 billion in revenue, providing a strong FY2026 guidance. Despite this, company insiders have sold a significant amount of shares totaling $18.15 million, and there are concerns regarding backlog conversion risk due to supply chain issues.

title: Aventail Capital Group LP Invests $5.07 Million in Pool Corporation $POOL
summary: Aventail Capital Group LP has initiated a new position in Pool Corporation, purchasing 16,339 shares valued at approximately $5.07 million. Other institutional investors like Jacobs Levy Equity Management Inc., Millennium Management LLC, and Acadian Asset Management LLC have also adjusted their holdings in POOL. The article also details recent insider trading activities, the company's financial performance, dividend announcements, and updated analyst ratings.

title: Rivian Down 16% In March As CEO Scaringe Bets The Company On A Tesla Model Y Killer
summary: Rivian's stock is down 16% in March after unveiling its R2 SUV, which CEO RJ Scaringe views as a "make-or-break product" targeting the mass market, specifically competing with Tesla's Model Y. Despite an advertised $45,000 entry price, the R2 launched at $57,990, with the cheaper version delayed until late 2027. The company faces a challenging EV market, with softening demand, significant financial losses in 2025, and issues like the expiration of federal tax credits and potential tariffs.

title: AXT Inc. (AXTI) Skyrockets 50.9% on Tech Surge
summary: AXT Inc. (NASDAQ:AXTI) saw a significant surge of 50.9% week-on-week, driven by investor interest in technology stocks and a shift away from sectors affected by Middle East tensions. The company's stock also climbed 37% month-to-date, hitting an all-time high of $51.98, fueled by an optimistic Q1 outlook and expected progress on export permits, particularly for indium phosphide in AI infrastructure. Despite widening net losses and declining revenues in the previous year, AXT Inc. plans to double its indium phosphide manufacturing capacity.

title: Musk says Tesla's 'gigantic' chip fab project to launch in seven days
summary: Elon Musk announced that Tesla's "Terafab" project, a colossal initiative to manufacture artificial intelligence chips, will commence in seven days. This project aims to address the anticipated shortage of AI chips needed for Tesla's autonomous driving ambitions, as existing supplier capacities are deemed insufficient. Musk previously hinted at potential collaborations with Intel, TSMC, and Samsung for this endeavor.

title: TD offers callable contingent notes tied to META/NVDA/TSLA (NYSE: TD)
summary: The Toronto-Dominion Bank (TD) is offering Callable Contingent Interest Notes linked to the performance of Meta Platforms, Inc. (META), NVIDIA Corporation (NVDA), and Tesla, Inc. (TSLA) common stocks. These notes offer a contingent interest of approximately 10.75% per annum, payable only if each linked stock's closing value is at or above 80% of its initial value on observation dates. TD retains the option to call the notes monthly starting from the twelfth contingent interest payment date, with a maturity date set for December 16, 2030.

title: How to view Tesla's Cybercab during SXSW
summary: Tesla showcased its upcoming Cybercab robotaxi and Optimus robot at a free pop-up event during the South by Southwest Conference and Festivals in Austin. The display, which continued through Saturday, March 14, allowed the public to get an up-close look at the vehicle, which notably lacks a steering wheel or pedals. This public appearance is part of Tesla's efforts to build hype for the Cybercab, despite regulatory hurdles and recent staff departures, with production expected to begin in April.

title: ATMP SEC Filings - Barclays ETN+ Select MLP 10-K, 10-Q, 8-K Forms
summary: This page provides a comprehensive resource for Barclays ETN+ Select MLP (ATMP) SEC filings, including annual, quarterly, and material event reports. It highlights that ATMP is an unsecured debt obligation of Barclays Bank PLC, whose regulatory reports (like 6-K forms) are crucial for assessing the issuer's creditworthiness. The platform offers AI-powered summaries to simplify complex regulatory language and provides real-time updates of new filings.

title: Is XPeng (NYSE:XPEV) Pricing Reflect Long Term Value After Recent Share Rebound
summary: This article analyzes XPeng's (NYSE:XPEV) valuation using Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) and Price-to-Sales (P/S) ratios, noting a recent rebound in share price. The DCF model suggests the stock is undervalued by 34.8% at US$19.97, while the P/S ratio indicates it is overvalued compared to its fair ratio. The analysis also introduces "Narratives" for investors to develop their own valuation theses based on bull or bear case assumptions.

title: The Baron Capital Blueprint: An Active Solution For True Growth
summary: In 2026's dynamic market, investors seek active managers conducting in-depth research with a long-term view to identify growth drivers. The Baron First Principles ETF (RONB), managed by Ron, David, and Michael Baron, uses a "First Principles" approach to find companies with true growth prospects and sustainable competitive advantages. This high-conviction portfolio aims for long-term growth outperformance by focusing on intrinsic value, strong management, and competitive moats.

title: XPeng Inc Stock (ISIN: KYG970081173) Faces Headwinds Amid China EV Slowdown
summary: XPeng Inc stock is facing pressure due to weakening delivery figures and intense competition in China's EV market, leading to investor caution, particularly among European holders. The company is grappling with price wars, subsidy cuts, and the need to balance volume growth with profitability. Despite some improvements in gross margins and a solid balance sheet, risks like continued price wars, supply chain disruptions, and regulatory changes remain, though exports and new models offer potential growth catalysts.

title: Exxon (XOM) Plans Legal Shift to Texas after More than a Century in New Jersey
summary: Exxon Mobil Corporation (XOM) is planning to move its legal domicile to Texas from New Jersey, where it has been incorporated since 1882. This strategic shift, subject to shareholder approval, is designed to place the company in a more business-friendly environment and protect it from what CEO Darren Woods calls shareholder "abuse" or frivolous lawsuits. Texas is already Exxon's operational headquarters, and the company believes the state has a better understanding of the oil and gas industry.

title: How Energy Vault’s $150 Million Note Deal Reshaped Its Balance Sheet
summary: Energy Vault Holdings, Inc. recently closed an upsized $150 million financing round in convertible senior notes, aiming to strengthen its balance sheet and support its own-and-operate strategy. A portion of these proceeds was used to repay existing higher-cost debt, specifically redeeming about $45 million in convertible debentures. This move is expected to improve the company's financial flexibility, following strong preliminary Q4 2025 results.

title: ExxonMobil proposes reincorporation to Texas amid growing corporate migration
summary: ExxonMobil's board of directors has unanimously recommended that shareholders approve the company's reincorporation from New Jersey to Texas. This move follows similar decisions by Tesla, SpaceX, and Coinbase, indicating a broader trend of corporations seeking Texas's business-friendly legal environment. The decision highlights Texas's legislative efforts to support legal reincorporations and its emerging strength as a corporate jurisdiction.

title: BOK Financial Corporation Stock Live Price, Chart, Analysis, News & Forecast – Buy, Sell & Trade US Equities Today
summary: This article provides a detailed financial overview of BOK Financial Corporation (BOKF), including its current stock price, key metrics like market cap, revenue, EBITDA, and analyst ratings. It also summarizes the company's historical stock performance, offers insights into investing in US stocks, and lists popular US stocks, alongside recent market news.

title: Jabil Inc Stock (ISIN: US47759T1007) Eyes AI Datacenter Surge Ahead of March 18 Earnings
summary: Jabil Inc (ISIN: US47759T1007) stock is trading near record highs, driven by increased institutional investment and a strategic shift towards high-margin AI datacenter and healthcare segments. Ahead of its Q2 2026 earnings on March 18, analysts are optimistic about the company's growth, evidenced by strong past performance and expectations of accelerated AI-driven revenue. The company's diversified manufacturing model and innovative partnerships in photonics are key factors positioning it as a significant player in the AI supercycle.

title: Nio Onvo L60 to add LiDAR version in shift from pure vision strategy
summary: Nio's sub-brand Onvo will introduce a LiDAR-equipped version of its L60 mid-size SUV, signaling a strategic shift from its previous pure vision autonomous driving approach. This move, following a similar plan for the larger L90 SUV, aims to boost demand in a challenging market, as Onvo faces pressure to increase sales and adapt to consumer preferences. The LiDAR version will offer enhanced advanced driver assistance capabilities, aligning with most Chinese EV makers, while also potentially increasing the vehicle's price.

title: JLL Unveils Accelerate 2030 Strategy, Expands Share Buybacks
summary: Jones Lang Lasalle (JLL) has announced its Accelerate 2030 multi-year strategy, aiming to leverage its global scale, resilient balance sheet, and integrated platform for continued growth and capital discipline. The company also authorized an additional $2.2 billion in share repurchases, signaling confidence in its financial strength. An AI analyst from TipRanks rates JLL as "Outperform" due to improving financial performance and a constructive earnings outlook.

title: Texas may soon gain another major company incorporation
summary: Another major company, eXp World Holdings Inc. (Nasdaq: EXPI), is proposing to relocate its state of incorporation from Delaware to Texas, following recent corporate law changes in Texas. This trend has seen other large companies like Tesla Inc., Coinbase Global Inc., and potentially Exxon Mobil Corp., also considering or making the move to Texas. The changes in Texas's corporate laws are attracting firms seeking new governance and stockholder rights considerations.

title: Tesla to open new showroom in South Florida
summary: Tesla is planning to open a new showroom in Kendall, South Florida, with an anticipated opening in late 2026. The announcement was made by Mark Dovich of the South Florida Business Journal. This expansion highlights Tesla's continued growth and presence in the Florida market.

title: What's Going On With XPeng Stock On Thursday?
summary: XPeng Inc. shares saw gains in Thursday's premarket trading after rolling out its second-generation Vision-Language-Action (VLA 2.0) system, featured in new P7 Ultra, G7 Ultra, and X9 Ultra models currently undergoing nationwide test drives in China. The company is also expanding into humanoid robotics, aiming for large-scale production of its IRON robot by year-end, which will leverage the same VLA architecture. Investors are also anticipating XPeng's Q4 2025 earnings report on March 20, with analysts expecting revenue growth.

title: The Baron Capital Blueprint: An Active Solution For True Growth
summary: The article highlights the Baron First Principles ETF (RONB) as an active solution for investors seeking long-term growth in a rapidly changing market. Managed by Ron, David, and Michael Baron, the fund employs a "First Principles" approach to identify companies with strong fundamentals and sustainable competitive advantages. This strategy focuses on intrinsic value, exceptional management teams, and strong moats, aiming to deliver outperformance over the long term.

title: $50,000 Lucids Are Coming: New Details on Its Mid-Size Electric SUVs
summary: Lucid plans to introduce a new mid-size electric vehicle platform that will underpin three models, including the Cosmos and Earth SUVs, with production starting in late 2026. These models are designed to lower the brand's entry price to under $50,000, offering competitive efficiency with a projected 4.5 miles per kilowatt-hour and a 300-mile range for the Cosmos with a 69-kWh battery. Lucid aims to follow other EV manufacturers by expanding its luxury-focused lineup with more accessible, yet still premium, electric SUVs.

title: EV Investors Hoping for a Rebound Could Be Left Waiting
summary: US electric vehicle (EV) registrations declined for the first time in a decade last year, with a significant drop in December 2025 due to the expiration of federal tax credits. While Tesla still leads the market, its share is dwindling, and Ford also saw a substantial decline. Cadillac was a rare bright spot in the challenging market. Investors should not expect a quick rebound but rather a gradual increase, focusing on companies that can offer fresh products and lower prices while maintaining margins.

title: EV Investors Hoping for a Rebound Could Be Left Waiting
summary: U.S. electric vehicle (EV) registrations declined for the first time in a decade last year, dropping 0.4% overall and dramatically by 48% in December due to the expiration of federal tax credits. While Tesla maintains a significant market share, its lead is shrinking, and most automakers, including Ford, saw substantial declines, though GM's Cadillac was a rare bright spot. Despite continued improvements in charging infrastructure and narrowing price gaps, analysts suggest investors should not expect a quick rebound in EV sales, instead anticipating a gradual increase.

title: United Bancorp Inc Stock Live Price, Chart, Analysis, News & Forecast – Buy, Sell & Trade US Equities Today
summary: This article provides a detailed financial overview of United Bancorp Inc (UBCP), including its current stock price, market capitalization, revenue, dividends, and analyst ratings. It also summarizes the company's historical stock performance and offers information on how to invest in US stocks. United Bancorp Inc is identified as the banking holding company for Unified Bank, providing commercial and retail banking services in Ohio.

title: Royal Caribbean Cruises tops growth factor grades among S&P consumer discretionary holdings (RCL:NYSE)
summary: Royal Caribbean Cruises (RCL) has received top growth factor grades among S&P consumer discretionary holdings, indicating strong growth prospects despite recent market challenges impacting the S&P 500. Other companies with high growth grades include Realty Income, Tesla, Amazon, and Booking Holdings. The growth factor grade system ranges from A+ to F, with B- or higher being a "Buy" and D+ or below a "Sell," reflecting the quantitative growth prospects and business expansion ability of a company.

title: Assessing SQM (NYSE:SQM) Valuation After Record Lithium Sales And Nova Andino Litio Partnership
summary: Sociedad Química y Minera de Chile (SQM) has reported record quarterly lithium sales and formed a partnership with Codelco, creating Nova Andino Litio. Despite recent strong share performance, the company's valuation is seen as modestly overvalued with its $75.67 share price slightly above its narrative fair value of $75.33. Investors should consider lithium price volatility and regulatory risks when evaluating SQM's future potential.

title: Honda Killing Its EVs Might Mean Sony Is Screwed, Too
summary: Honda has announced it is canceling the development and launch of three electric vehicles, which were all to be based on the same next-generation EV platform. This decision puts the future of the Afeela 1, an electric sedan from a joint venture between Honda and Sony that also uses this platform, into jeopardy. Sony Honda Mobility is currently reviewing how Honda's decision affects their joint venture, and the Afeela's current price and range make it uncompetitive in the EV market.

title: Lotus Tech Becomes the Second Automaker to Obtain UN R171 Certification Globally, Advancing ADAS Compliance
summary: Lotus Technology Inc. has become the second automaker globally to receive UN R171.01 certification for its hyper-SUV, LOTUS Eletre. This certification is for Level 2 Driver Control Assistance Systems (DCAS) and allows the Eletre to roll out its Highway Navigation Pilot (HNP) function in Europe starting June 2026 via over-the-air updates. The achievement underscores Lotus Tech's commitment to safety and compliance with international ADAS standards.

title: Responsive Playbooks and the TSLP Inflection
summary: This article by Stock Traders Daily's Quantitative Research Desk provides an analysis of the Tesla (TSLA) ETF (NASDAQ: TSLP), indicating a neutral near and mid-term outlook but a positive long-term bias. It outlines detailed trading strategies including position trading, momentum breakout, and risk hedging, along with multi-timeframe signal analysis and support/resistance levels. The report suggests elevated downside risk due to the absence of additional long-term support signals.

title: AMC Robotics partners with HIVE for AI compute infrastructure
summary: AMC Robotics Corporation has announced a partnership with HIVE Digital Technologies to utilize HIVE's GPU AI compute infrastructure for developing and deploying AI-driven robotics applications. This collaboration will support AMC Robotics' AI optimization, data processing, and infrastructure scalability, leveraging HIVE's expanding GPU AI Cloud services for enterprise demand. AMC Robotics recently showcased its AI-powered quadruped robot Kyro, while HIVE aims to address the growing demand for AI compute in robotics.

title: Nvidia Isn't Alone: SanDisk, Pan American Silver Now Have 2X Leveraged ETFs
summary: REX Shares and Tuttle Capital Management have launched two new 2X leveraged ETFs: the T-REX 2X Long PAAS Daily Target ETF (PAAU) offering amplified exposure to Pan American Silver Corp. (PAAS) and the T-REX 2X Long SNDK Daily Target ETF (SNDU) for SanDisk Corporation (SNDK). These additions expand their suite of single-stock leveraged ETFs to over 40 products, catering to traders seeking magnified short-term returns in specific companies and sectors like precious metals and data storage. The new funds reflect the increasing demand for tools to capitalize on daily stock movements.

title: Diageo (DEO) Slid on Softening Demand Trends
summary: Diageo plc (DEO) stock has experienced a significant slump, declining 29.4% over the past year due to subdued demand for spirits and uncertainties from trade wars and tariffs. Despite its current struggles, Emerald Wealth Partners believes the stock is undervalued, reaching its lowest point since 2015, and anticipates a normalization of the cycle with new leadership strengthening its brand portfolio and capital discipline. While acknowledging the risks, the investment firm itself is focusing on AI stocks for higher short-term returns.

title: How Autocallable ETFs Are Revolutionizing Single-Stock Income
summary: GraniteShares is introducing autocallable single-stock ETFs to make institutional income strategies more accessible to advisors and investors. These ETFs aim to overcome traditional structured note drawbacks like illiquidity and high fees by offering continuous liquidity, lower costs, and a laddered design. The strategy, which combines elements of equities and fixed income, provides defined income streams and downside protection, leveraging the volatility of high-growth stocks like Tesla and Nvidia.
